content.query:
IF OBJECT_ID('ODS.F9_AGENT_CALL_LOGS')  IS NOT NULL 
DROP TABLE [ODS].[F9_AGENT_CALL_LOGS]

GO



CREATE TABLE ODS.F9_AGENT_CALL_LOGS
(
DIVISION 		NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
AGENT_GROUP		NVARCHAR(255),
AGENT_NAME		NVARCHAR(255),
CALL_TYPE		NVARCHAR(255),
DISPOSITION		NVARCHAR(255),
CALL_ID			NVARCHAR(255),
DATE			DATE,
TIME			TIME,
SOURCE			NVARCHAR(255),
SUBSOURCE		NVARCHAR(255),
CAMPAIGN		NVARCHAR(255),
LIST_NAME		NVARCHAR(255),
TALKTIME		TIME,
AFTER_CALL_WORK_TIME	TIME,	
ANI_CODE		INT,
ANI				BIGINT,
NUMBER1			BIGINT,
CUSTID			BIGINT,
SKILLS			NVARCHAR(255),
PRODUCT			NVARCHAR(255),
MARKET			NVARCHAR(255),
FILE_NAME 		NVARCHAR(255)
);
